title: ORION manifest
description: Schema for .orion/orion.yaml — the single source of truth for ORION skills, hooks, rules, agents, and adapters.

orion.description: Minimum ORION CLI version required to read this manifest.

project.description: Host-project identity. Mirrors the top-level fields of PROJECT_CONTEXT.yaml.

type.description: Project classification used by skills to adjust output.

root.description: Root directory relative to the project root. Almost always '.'.

stack.description: Tech stack declared per layer. Migrated from scaffold.json on `orion migrate`.

adapters.description: Which IDEs ORION compiles for and per-adapter preferences.

install_dir.description: Target directory under project root. e.g. '.claude', '.cursor'.

router_name.description: The slash-command name for the router skill. Default: 'orion' → /orion.

session_start.description: 'native' for IDEs with a SessionStart event; 'first-turn-marker' otherwise.

per_skill_stubs.description: Generate one 3-line stub per skill for per-skill IDE autocomplete. Off by default.

agents_md_target.description: Path for merged rules file when IDE uses AGENTS.md instead of CLAUDE.md. e.g. 'AGENTS.md'.

skills.description: The routing table. Each entry declares one skill the router can dispatch to.

name.description: Kebab-case skill name. Used as the sub-command: /orion <name>.

source.description: Path to the skill directory relative to .orion/. Must start with 'skills/'.

description.description: One-sentence description. Aggregated into the router stub's description field.

tools.description: Tools this skill may use. Enforced by the router and by orion run.

triggers.description: Natural-language phrases that auto-route to this skill in the IDE.

agents.description: Agent names this skill may invoke as sub-agents.

profiles.description: Profile tags. Skills are filtered by profile on orion install --profile=<name>.

hard_block.description: Skills that are blocked until this skill passes. e.g. validate-story blocks implement-story.

threshold.description: Numeric threshold used with hard_block. Block triggers when score < threshold.

lock_required.description: If true, this skill produces a .orion/state/locks/<id>.json as its output artifact. The CLI recognises this to enforce the lock gate in implement-story. Replaces score-based threshold for harden-style certification skills.

inline.description: If true, embed the full SKILL.md body in the IDE-native file instead of routing. Use for tiny skills.

hooks.description: Shell scripts declared once; adapter maps each intent to the IDE's native event.

script.description: Path to the hook script relative to .orion/. e.g. 'hooks/pre-push-gate1.sh'.

intents.description: IDE-agnostic intent names. Adapter translates to IDE events.

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns filtering which file edits trigger this hook.

tool_patterns.description: Regex patterns filtering which tool names trigger this hook.

blocks.description: If true, a non-zero exit from the script blocks the triggering operation.

fallback.description: Fallback strategies when the IDE doesn't support the intent natively.

intent_map.description: Maps IDE-agnostic intents to each IDE's native event vocabulary. Consumed by adapters.

rules.description: Canonical rule files compiled per IDE. Each entry becomes part of CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .mdc.

source.description: Path to rule markdown relative to .orion/. e.g. 'rules/AGILE.md'.

globs.description: File globs. For Cursor: compiled to .mdc frontmatter. For Claude Code / Codex: merged into context unconditionally.

targets.description: Which adapters compile this rule. Defaults to all enabled adapters.

agents.description: Agent role definitions. Referenced by skills[].agents.

source.description: Path to agent markdown relative to .orion/. e.g. 'agents/pm-agent.md'.

profiles.description: Named skill bundles. orion install --profile=<name> installs a subset.

state.description: Written by orion install. Hand-edit only when reconciling drift.
